description:
Operating Area: Greece

M/Y Liberdade is a striking 42 metre luxury, comfortable and sporty superyacht, built in 2007 by the renowned Italian shipyard ISA Yachts and refitted in 2019 and 2025. With exterior design by Andrea Bacigalupo and sophisticated interiors by Cristiano Gatto, she is a true showcase of Italian excellence in luxury yachting. Measuring 8 metre in beam, with a draught of 1.52 metre and a volume of 319 GT, Liberdade offers generous onboard spaces. She can comfortably accommodate up to 11 guests in 5 elegant suites, including a full-beam master suite with his and-hers en-suite facilities, while an experienced crew of 7 members ensures the highest standards of service. Designed for both performance and comfort, Liberdade reaches speeds of up to 30 knots, combining powerful cruising with stability and ease. Her refined interiors, crafted with premium materials and understated elegance, provide a welcoming environment for relaxation and entertainment at sea. A perfect blend of style and sophistication for which Liberdade delivers an exclusive yachting experience to guests seeking performance without compromise.

blueprint.name: LIBERDADE
tenders: 1 x 5.36m Castoldi Jet with Yanmar Marine inboard engine 85HP

crew.name: Marianthi Kasdagli
crew.bio:
Accomplished Master Mariner Class A’ and Yacht Master with extensive seagoing experience across luxury yachts, boutique cruises, and commercial vessels. Proven record as Captain on private and chartered superyachts, leading diverse international crews and ensuring the highest levels of safety, efficiency, and guest satisfaction. 
Skilled in navigation, operations, and delivering a seamless luxury experience for UHNW clients and distinguished guests. 
Fluent in Greek and proficient in English, with strong leadership, organizational, and communication skills. 
Dedicated to excellence, discretion, and professionalism in every aspect of yachting. She speaks Greek and English.

crew.name: Sotiris Ntontos
crew.bio:
Dynamic and safety-driven Marine Engineer with international seafaring experience and a proven track record of excellence in yacht and ship operations. Known for strong technical expertise, hands-on leadership, and a proactive approach to problem-solving. Trained at the Maritime Academy of Thessaloniki and certified with multiple professional licenses, including Speed Boat and Lifeguard, he combines strong technical knowledge with a proactive approach to crew collaboration and guest satisfaction.
Combines discipline and adaptability with a passion for the sea, ensuring smooth, safe, and efficient vessel performance at all times.
He speaks Greek and English.

crew.name: Dimitrios Bamplekis
crew.bio: Creative and adaptable Private Yacht Chef with professional training from Le Monde Institute of Hotel and Tourism Studies and diverse experience across fine dining restaurants, luxury catering, and yachting. Skilled in Mediterranean and Modern Greek cuisine, with additional expertise in comfort food, sushi, and seafood textures. Proven ability to deliver exceptional dining experiences for both guests and crew, balancing precision, flavor, and presentation under high-demand conditions. Recognized for flexibility, fast decision-making, and meticulous attention to detail, ensuring premium service on every charter or private trip. Passionate about crafting memorable culinary experiences at sea with a focus on sustainability and seasonality. He speaks Greek and English.

crew.name: Areti Margioris
crew.bio:
Energetic and service-oriented Stewardess with a strong background in VIP hospitality, event hosting, and guest relations. 
Experienced in delivering high-standard service within luxury environments for UHNW and celebrity clients, both on land and at sea. 
Skilled in housekeeping, fine dining service, cultural sensitivity, and teamwork, with a proven ability to thrive in high-pressure settings. 
Native English speaker with Greek as an additional language. Combining a love for the sea with a dedication to excellence, eager to contribute positively as a valuable member of a yacht crew.

crew.name: Markellos Xidas
crew.bio:
Highly motivated and versatile deckhand with extensive maritime experience, combining commercial shipping training and private yacht expertise. 
Proficient in deck maintenance, navigation support, mooring and anchoring operations, crane handling, and tender & jet ski operations.
Experienced in watersports assistance and onboard safety procedures. Certified in STCW 2010, ENG1, Powerboat Level 2, and PADI scuba diving. Bringing professionalism, adaptability, and a hands-on approach to every role on board. He speaks Greek and English.

crew.name: Anas Essayed Ahmed Elmewafy
crew.bio:
Seasoned maritime professional with over 15 years of seafaring experience, including 8 years on cruise ships as AB/Bosun. Highly skilled in deck operations, navigation, cargo handling, ship maintenance, and passenger safety. 
Certified in STCW, Crisis & Crowd Management, Passenger Safety, and Survival Crafts & Rescue Boats. 
Strong leadership, technical knowledge, and hands-on expertise in all aspects of yacht operations. His mother language is Arabic, he has excellent knowledge in English hardworking, and dedicated to maintaining the highest standards onboard.
